_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of all possible circumstances that would result in changing collection management authorities.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of reference data management principles, including reference data taxonomy, governance of controlled vocabularies, and change management for reference data updates.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-013 (RC, cosine: 0.455), RC-K-007 (RC, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.481). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, management]. DCWF-only terms [authorities, changing, circumstances, collection, possible, result] vs WIDAI-only terms [change, controlled, data, governance, principles, reference] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.890, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.030 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Knowledge of all possible circumstances that would result in changing collection" and "Knowledge of reference data management principles, including reference data taxo" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.474 ≈ STS 0.481 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, management] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, management]. DCWF-only: [authorities, changing, circumstances, collection, possible, result]. WIDAI-only: [change, controlled, data, governance, principles, reference].
